issues.title: L1 submission failed or unavailable
issues.detail: l1_submitted = false indicates l1_tx_hash IS NULL. Lock is in 'pending' status but has not been submitted to L1 Vault. Expected specification states 'l1_submitted must equal t when L1 Vault is reachable'. Either L1 Vault is unreachable or the submission path failed.

observations: Database query found lock_id 0x9370d0485aea8ee1e5450e8c40f9930c7b102a46f2acfcb8e6a4dfbf5d70c80f
No l1_tx_hash present in locks table for this lock
L1 anchoring transaction was never submitted or not recorded
L1Vault totalLocked() call succeeded: 120000000000000000 wei (1.2e17)
Total locked value unchanged, indicating no new lock was anchored on L1
Exit code 1 confirms test failure

issues.title: L1 anchoring did not occur
issues.detail: The most recent lock (id: 0x9370d0485aea8ee1e5450e8c40f9930c7b102a46f2acfcb8e6a4dfbf5d70c80f) has no l1_tx_hash recorded in the database. This indicates the lock was never submitted to L1. Root cause: QS__L1_PRIVATE_KEY environment variable may be unset, preventing transaction submission to L1 Vault (0x07012aeF87C6E423c32F2f8eaF81762f63337260).

issues.title: Missing Locked event emission
issues.detail: Without an l1_tx_hash, no transaction was mined on L1, so the expected Locked event from L1Vault was not emitted. The lock is stuck in pending state and cannot progress through the protocol.
